message:
🌱 Add clickhouse: RFC: Semistructured Columns mission (#992)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "clickhouse-54864-rfc-semistructured-columns",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "clickhouse: RFC: Semistructured Columns",
+    "description": "RFC: Semistructured Columns. Requested by 49+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current ClickHouse setup",
+        "description": "Verify your ClickHouse version:\n```bash\nclickhouse-client --version\n```\nThe Variant data type requires a recent ClickHouse version."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review semistructured columns",
+        "description": "ClickHouse introduced the `Variant` data type as part of the semistructured columns RFC. `Variant(T1, T2, ..., TN)` allows each row to hold a value of any specified type or NULL. This replaces the experimental JSON data type."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Use the Variant data type",
+        "description": "Create a table with a Variant column:\n```sql\nSET allow_experimental_variant_type = 1;\n\nCREATE TABLE test_variant (\n    id UInt32,\n    data Variant(String, UInt64, Array(String))\n) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;\n\nINSERT INTO test_variant VALUES\n    (1, 'hello'), (2, 42), (3, ['a', 'b']);\n\nSELECT id, data, variantType(data) FROM test_variant;\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify Variant type works",
+        "description": "Test querying Variant columns:\n```sql\nSELECT * FROM test_variant WHERE variantType(data) = 'String';\nSELECT data.String FROM test_variant;\n```\nConfirm type-specific access and filtering work correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "ClickHouse implemented the Variant data type for semistructured columns, allowing each row to hold values of different types as a better alternative to the experimental JSON type.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "clickhouse",
+      "community",
+      "analytics-db",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "clickhouse"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",

+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/54864",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/pull/58047"
+    },
+    "reactions": 49,
+    "comments": 37,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "clickhouse-client"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working ClickHouse installation with Variant type support."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:48:44.759Z",
